Hello! I'm the Amazon FBA Agent planning system. I can help you with:

**Workflow Operations:**
- Launch main workflows or sandboxed runs for suppliers
- Cancel active runs
- Check run status and view logs

**Product Analysis:**
- Query financial data (ROI, profit margins)
- Search cached supplier products
- Look up Amazon linking entries

**Product List Management:**
- Refresh/re-analyze existing product lists
- Build new product lists from cached data

**Available Suppliers:** angelwholesale.co.uk, clearance-king.co.uk, dkwholesale.com, efghousewares.co.uk, kdwholesale.co.uk, laceywholesale.co.uk, poundwholesale.co.uk, stationerywholesale.co.uk, wholesaletradingsupplies.co.uk

The last run was for **angelwholesale.co.uk** (run ID: `6ef966ac-b26c-4b0b-bd50-991475682e9a`), which has been cancelled.

What would you like to do?

Run clearance-king on these two categories with max 5 products each: https://www.clearance-king.co.uk/smoking-products/lighters-accessories.html and https://www.clearance-king.co.uk/electrical/switches-sockets.html
